✔ Ex: Should only a select few be able to purge their archetypes, or is it open to all at extreme cost?

3. Should Some Rituals Require Group Participation, or Should They Always Be Individual?

✔ Ex: Can a class-wide vote be needed to approve or deny a ritual, or should it always be personal?

🚀 Now ready to execute Version 9.0. Awaiting final input before moving forward. 🎮📖 Are you fully satisfied with this plan?

📌 Version 9.1 – Finalizing Faction-Based Fate Reversals, Archetype Purge Mechanics, & Group Rituals


🚀 This iteration locks in faction-based sacrifices for fate reversals, structured archetype purges, and the requirement for some rituals to be group-based.

📜 1. Fate Manipulations & Reversals Require One Player From Each Faction to Sacrifice Something

📜 To alter or reverse fate, representatives from multiple factions must willingly offer something of value.
context: From document: RPG Character System (Fully Integrated into Weekly Modules) — chunk 536 (chunk 536/555)
